project_overview: A cyberpunk-themed personal portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features 3D animations using Three.js, glassmorphism UI, particle effects, responsive design, and GitHub stats integration. Deployed on Netlify.

A full-stack web application for managing student records, courses, attendance, and grades. Built with React frontend and Node.js/Express backend with MySQL database. Includes role-based authentication using JWT for admin and student portals.

A React-based task management application with CRUD operations, drag-and-drop task reordering, priority levels, and deadline tracking. Backend powered by Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB with persistent user authentication.

A responsive weather application consuming the OpenWeatherMap API to display real-time weather data, 5-day forecasts, and location-based search. Built with React and CSS3, featuring a clean, modern user interface.

A production-ready REST API built with Express.js following best practices: proper routing, request validation, error handling middleware, rate limiting, JWT authentication, and full CRUD operations with PostgreSQL database.
